reasoning: The chart fails to answer the specific business question, which asks for revenue *by year* (2021-2024). Instead, it plots monthly data points sequentially on a single X-axis representing months (Jan-Dec), effectively ignoring the year dimension in the visual structure. This creates a confusing 'spaghetti' line where data from different years overlaps at the same x-coordinates (e.g., all Januaries are at x=0), making it impossible to distinguish trends per year or easily sum up annual totals visually. Furthermore, the title claims 'Summary by Year', but the visualization is clearly monthly. A bar chart aggregating revenue by year would be required.
suggested_improvement: Aggregate the monthly revenue data into yearly totals and use a Bar Chart with Years (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) on the X-axis and Total Revenue on the Y-axis.
